origin.zh: 葡萄牙特拉什-奥斯-蒙蒂什地区

history.en: Ancient Iberian mastiff-type breed developed in the remote Trás-os-Montes region of northern Portugal, used for centuries by shepherds to guard flocks against wolves and other predators in harsh mountain conditions. Recognized by the FCI for its courage, loyalty, and ability to work independently.
history.zh: 古老的伊比利亚獒犬型犬种，培育于葡萄牙北部偏远的特拉斯-奥斯-蒙蒂斯地区，几个世纪以来被牧羊人用于在恶劣山区环境中保护羊群免受狼和其他捕食者侵害。因其勇气、忠诚和独立工作能力获FCI认可。

overview.en: The Cão de Gado Transmontano is a large, ancient Iberian mastiff-type breed from the remote Trás-os-Montes region of Portugal. Bred for centuries to guard flocks against wolves and predators in harsh mountain conditions, this dog is renowned for its courage, loyalty, and independent nature. It is calm and confident at home, but extremely protective of its territory and family. While not aggressive without reason, it possesses a strong guardian instinct and requires an experienced owner who can provide firm, consistent leadership. This breed is intelligent, resilient, and thrives when given a job to do. It is not a dog for novice owners, as its size and protective drive demand proper socialization and training from an early age.
overview.zh: 特兰斯蒙塔诺牧牛犬是一种大型古老伊比利亚獒犬品种，源自葡萄牙偏远的特拉什-奥斯-蒙蒂什地区。几个世纪以来，它被培育用于在恶劣山区环境中保护羊群免受狼和其他掠食者的侵害，以其勇敢、忠诚和独立的性格而闻名。它在家里冷静自信，但对领地和家庭极度保护。虽然不会无故攻击，但它具有强烈的护卫本能，需要有经验的主人提供坚定一致的领导。该品种聪明、坚韧，在有任务可做时表现最佳。不适合新手饲养，因为其体型和保护欲需要从小进行适当的社会化和训练。

care.en: Daily care for the Cão de Gado Transmontano is relatively low-maintenance. Its short to medium double coat requires brushing twice a week to remove dead hair, with more frequent brushing during seasonal shedding. Bathing is needed only occasionally. Nail trimming every 3-4 weeks and regular ear checks are essential. Exercise needs are moderate; a long daily walk or secure yard time is sufficient, but avoid excessive running or jumping during growth to protect joints. This breed is not suited for apartment living and needs a large, securely fenced property. Regular veterinary check-ups, including hip and elbow dysplasia screening, are recommended. Annual vaccinations, parasite control, and dental care should be maintained.
care.zh: 特兰斯蒙塔诺牧牛犬的日常护理相对简单。其中短双层被毛每周刷两次以去除死毛，换毛期需增加频率。偶尔洗澡即可。每3-4周修剪指甲，并定期检查耳朵。运动需求适中，每天一次长距离散步或安全的院子活动足够，但生长期避免过度跑跳以保护关节。该品种不适合公寓生活，需要大面积且有牢固围栏的场地。建议定期进行兽医检查，包括髋关节和肘关节发育不良筛查。保持年度疫苗接种、寄生虫控制和牙齿护理。

training.en: Training a Cão de Gado Transmontano requires patience, consistency, and an understanding of its independent guarding heritage. This breed responds best to positive reinforcement methods such as praise, treats, and play, but it needs a confident handler who can set clear boundaries. Harsh corrections can damage trust and lead to stubbornness. Early socialization is critical—expose the puppy to various people, animals, and environments to prevent over-protectiveness. Obedience training should start early, focusing on recall and impulse control. Because of its size and strength, loose-leash walking and reliable recall are essential. This dog is intelligent but can be willful; short, varied sessions work best. It excels in canine sports like schutzhund or weight pulling, which channel its drive.
training.zh: 训练特兰斯蒙塔诺牧牛犬需要耐心、一致性以及对其独立护卫天性的理解。该品种对表扬、零食和游戏等正向强化方法反应最佳，但需要自信的处理者设定明确界限。严厉的纠正会破坏信任并导致固执。早期社会化至关重要——让幼犬接触不同的人、动物和环境，以防止过度保护。服从训练应尽早开始，重点培养召回和冲动控制。由于体型和力量，松绳散步和可靠的召回非常必要。这种狗聪明但可能任性，短而多样的训练课程效果最好。它擅长护卫犬赛或负重拉拽等犬类运动，可疏导其驱动力。

diet.en: The Cão de Gado Transmontano requires a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for large, giant breeds. Its food should be rich in protein and healthy fats to support muscle maintenance and energy, with controlled calcium and phosphorus levels to avoid skeletal issues during growth. Puppies should be fed three to four small meals per day to prevent bloat, a serious risk in deep-chested breeds. Adults can be fed two meals daily. Avoid high-grain or low-quality fillers. Joint supplements such as glucosamine and chondroitin are beneficial, especially as the dog ages. Fresh water must always be available. Monitor weight carefully, as obesity stresses joints. Consult a veterinarian for portion sizes and any dietary adjustments based on activity level and health.
diet.zh: 特兰斯蒙塔诺牧牛犬需要适合大型和巨型犬的高质量均衡饮食。食物应富含蛋白质和健康脂肪以维持肌肉和能量，同时控制钙磷比例以避免生长期骨骼问题。幼犬每天应分三到四小餐喂食，以预防胃扭转——这对深胸犬种是严重风险。成年犬可每日喂两餐。避免高谷物或低质量填充物。葡萄糖胺和软骨素等关节补充剂有益，尤其随着犬只年龄增长。必须随时提供新鲜饮水。密切监测体重，因为肥胖会给关节带来压力。根据活动水平和健康状况咨询兽医确定食量和饮食调整。

livingTips.en: The Cão de Gado Transmontano is not an apartment dog; it needs a large, securely fenced yard or rural property where it can patrol and roam. It is calm indoors but requires space. This breed is generally good with children in its own family, especially if raised with them, but due to its size and protective nature, supervision is always necessary. It may not tolerate rough play from unfamiliar children. With other pets, early socialization is key—it can coexist with cats and dogs it knows, but may be aggressive toward unfamiliar animals, especially other dogs of the same sex. It is not recommended for first-time owners. Ideal owners are experienced, active, and understand guardian breeds. The dog needs a job or regular structure to prevent boredom and destructive behavior.
livingTips.zh: 特兰斯蒙塔诺牧牛犬不适合公寓生活；它需要大面积且有牢固围栏的院子或乡村地产，以便巡逻和游荡。它在室内冷静，但需要足够空间。该品种通常对自己家庭的孩子友好，尤其是一起长大的，但因其体型和保护性，始终需要监督。它可能无法忍受陌生孩子的粗暴玩耍。对于其他宠物，早期社会化是关键——它能与认识的猫狗共存，但可能对陌生动物、特别是同性别的犬只表现出攻击性。不建议新手饲养。理想的主人有经验、活跃，并理解护卫犬品种。该犬需要工作或规律的活动，以防止无聊和破坏行为。
